en: The word that came to Jeremiah from the LORD:
zh: 耶和華有話臨到耶利米，說：

en: "Stand in the gate of the LORD's house, and proclaim there this word, and say, Hear the word of the LORD, all you men of Judah who enter these gates to worship the LORD.
zh: “你要站在耶和華的殿門口，在那裡宣告這話，說：‘所有進這些門來敬拜耶和華的猶大人哪！你們都要聽耶和華的話。’”

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: Amend your ways and your deeds, and I will let you dwell in this place.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：“你們要改正自己的所作所為，我就讓你們在這地方居住。

en: Do not trust in these deceptive words: 'This is the temple of the LORD, the temple of the LORD, the temple of the LORD.'
zh: 你們不要倚靠虛謊的話，說：‘這是耶和華的殿，是耶和華的殿，是耶和華的殿。’

en: "For if you truly amend your ways and your deeds, if you truly execute justice one with another,
zh: 如果你們實在改正自己的所作所為，人與人之間認真施行公正；

en: if you do not oppress the sojourner, the fatherless, or the widow, or shed innocent blood in this place, and if you do not go after other gods to your own harm,
zh: 如果你們不欺壓寄居的，不欺壓孤兒寡婦，不在這地方流無辜人的血，也不跟從別的神，自招禍患；

en: then I will let you dwell in this place, in the land that I gave of old to your fathers forever.
zh: 我就讓你們在賜給你們列祖直到永遠的這地方居住。

en: "Behold, you trust in deceptive words to no avail.
zh: “可是，你們竟然倚靠虛謊無益的話。

en: Will you steal, murder, commit adultery, swear falsely, make offerings to Baal, and go after other gods that you have not known,
zh: 你們怎可偷盜、兇殺、姦淫、起假誓、向巴力燒香，跟從你們素不認識的別神，

en: and then come and stand before me in this house, which is called by my name, and say, 'We are delivered!'- only to go on doing all these abominations?
zh: 然後來到這稱為我名下的殿，站在我面前，說：‘我們安全啦！’你們這樣就可以行這一切可憎的事嗎？

en: Has this house, which is called by my name, become a den of robbers in your eyes? Behold, I myself have seen it, declares the LORD.
zh: 這稱為我名下的殿，難道在你們眼中看為賊窩嗎？但我都看見了。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Go now to my place that was in Shiloh, where I made my name dwell at first, and see what I did to it because of the evil of my people Israel.
zh: “你們可以到示羅我的地方去，就是先前我名的居所，看看我因我子民以色列的邪惡，對那地方所行的。

en: And now, because you have done all these things, declares the LORD, and when I spoke to you persistently you did not listen, and when I called you, you did not answer,
zh: 現在，因你們行了這一切事，我不斷懇切告誡你們，你們卻不聽；我呼喚你們，你們卻不答話。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: therefore I will do to the house that is called by my name, and in which you trust, and to the place that I gave to you and to your fathers, as I did to Shiloh.
zh: “所以我從前怎樣對待示羅，將來也怎樣對待你們所倚靠的那稱為我名下的殿，以及我賜給你們和你們列祖的地方。

en: And I will cast you out of my sight, as I cast out all your kinsmen, all the offspring of Ephraim.
zh: 我必把你們從我面前趕出，像我從前趕出你們的眾兄弟，以法蓮所有的後裔一樣。

en: "As for you, do not pray for this people, or lift up a cry or prayer for them, and do not intercede with me, for I will not hear you.
zh: “至於你，不要為這人民祈禱，不要為他們呼求禱告，也不要為他們向我懇求，因為我不會聽你。

en: Do you not see what they are doing in the cities of Judah and in the streets of Jerusalem?
zh: 他們在猶大的各城中，在耶路撒冷的街道上所行的，你沒有看見嗎？

en: The children gather wood, the fathers kindle fire, and the women knead dough, to make cakes for the queen of heaven. And they pour out drink offerings to other gods, to provoke me to anger.
zh: 兒子撿柴，父親生火，婦女摶麵，為天后做餅，又向別的神澆奠祭，惹我發怒。

en: Is it I whom they provoke? declares the LORD. Is it not themselves, to their own shame?
zh: 他們害的是我嗎？豈不是他們自己，以致臉上蒙羞嗎？”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Therefore thus says the Lord GOD: behold, my anger and my wrath will be poured out on this place, upon man and beast, upon the trees of the field and the fruit of the ground; it will burn and not be quenched."
zh: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：“看哪！我的怒氣和忿怒，必倒在這地方，也必倒在人口、牲畜、田野的樹木和地的出產上；怒火燒起，不能熄滅。”

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: "Add your burnt offerings to your sacrifices, and eat the flesh.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：“你們儘管把燔祭加在平安祭上，自己吃祭肉吧！

en: For in the day that I brought them out of the land of Egypt, I did not speak to your fathers or command them concerning burnt offerings and sacrifices.
zh: 因為我把你們列祖從埃及地領出來的那日，燔祭和平安祭的事，我並沒有向他們提說，也沒有吩咐他們。

en: But this command I gave them: 'Obey my voice, and I will be your God, and you shall be my people. And walk in all the way that I command you, that it may be well with you.'
zh: 我只吩咐他們這一件事，說：‘你們要聽從我的話，我就作你們的 神，你們也作我的子民；你們要遵行我所吩咐的一切道，好使你們蒙福。’

en: But they did not obey or incline their ear, but walked in their own counsels and the stubbornness of their evil hearts, and went backward and not forward.
zh: 他們卻沒有聽從，也不留心，反倒按著他們的計謀，隨從自己頑梗的惡心行事，向後不向前。

en: From the day that your fathers came out of the land of Egypt to this day, I have persistently sent all my servants the prophets to them, day after day.
zh: 自從你們列祖出埃及地的那日直到今日，我差遣我的僕人眾先知到你們那裡去，而且是每日不斷差遣。

en: Yet they did not listen to me or incline their ear, but stiffened their neck. They did worse than their fathers.
zh: 你們 卻沒有聽從，毫不留心，反倒硬著頸項行惡，比你們 的列祖還厲害。

en: "So you shall speak all these words to them, but they will not listen to you. You shall call to them, but they will not answer you.
zh: “你要把這一切話告訴他們，他們卻不聽從你；你呼叫他們，他們也不回應。

en: And you shall say to them, 'This is the nation that did not obey the voice of the LORD their God, and did not accept discipline; truth has perished; it is cut off from their lips.
zh: 然而，你要對他們說：‘這就是不聽從耶和華他們 神的話，不受管教的國；誠實喪盡，並已從他們的口中斷絕了。

en: "' Cut off your hair and cast it away; raise a lamentation on the bare heights, for the LORD has rejected and forsaken the generation of his wrath.'
zh: “‘你要剪去頭髮，並且把它拋掉， 上到光禿的高岡舉哀， 因為耶和華擯斥、棄絕了 他所憎恨的世代。’”

en: "For the sons of Judah have done evil in my sight, declares the LORD. They have set their detestable things in the house that is called by my name, to defile it.
zh: “因為猶大人行了我看為惡的事，把他們可憎的偶像安放在稱為我名下的殿中，污瀆了這殿。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: And they have built the high places of Topheth, which is in the Valley of the Son of Hinnom, to burn their sons and their daughters in the fire, which I did not command, nor did it come into my mind.
zh: “他們在欣嫩子谷中，建造了陀斐特的邱壇，用火焚燒自己的兒女；這不是我吩咐的，我也沒有在心裡想過。

en: Therefore, behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when it will no more be called Topheth, or the Valley of the Son of Hinnom, but the Valley of Slaughter; for they will bury in Topheth, because there is no room elsewhere.
zh: 因此，看哪！日子快到，人必不再稱這地方為陀斐特或欣嫩子谷，卻要稱它為‘殺戮谷’；人必在陀斐特埋葬屍體，甚至無處可容。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: And the dead bodies of this people will be food for the birds of the air, and for the beasts of the earth, and none will frighten them away.
zh: “這人民的屍體，也必給空中的飛鳥和地上的野獸作食物，沒有人來驅趕。

en: And I will silence in the cities of Judah and in the streets of Jerusalem the voice of mirth and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom and the voice of the bride, for the land shall become a waste.
zh: 那時，我必在猶大的城市中和耶路撒冷的街道上，使歡欣和快樂的聲音、新郎和新婦的聲音止息，因為這地必要變為荒場。”
